import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  mut in_num = false
  mut sign = 1
  mut val = 0
  while i < n
    mut b = 0
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(v)
      b = v
    when None
      b = 0
    end
    if b >= 48 and b <= 57
      if not in_num
        in_num = true
        sign = 1
        val = 0
      end
      val = val * 10 + (b - 48)
    else if b == 45 and not in_num
      in_num = true
      sign = -1
      val = 0
    else
      if in_num
        result = list.push(result, sign * val)
        in_num = false
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if in_num
    result = list.push(result, sign * val)
  end
  result
end

fn dedup(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut out: List<Int> = []
  for x in xs
    if not list.contains(out, x)
      out = list.push(out, x)
    end
  end
  out
end

fn sort_asc(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut out: List<Int> = []
  for x in xs
    mut inserted: List<Int> = []
    mut done = false
    for y in out
      if not done and x < y
        inserted = list.push(inserted, x)
        done = true
      end
      inserted = list.push(inserted, y)
    end
    if not done
      inserted = list.push(inserted, x)
    end
    out = inserted
  end
  out
end

fn read_line_or_empty() -> String
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(l)
    l
  when None
    ""
  end
end

let line1 = read_line_or_empty()
let line2 = read_line_or_empty()

mut combined: List<Int> = []
for x in parse_ints(line1)
  combined = list.push(combined, x)
end
for x in parse_ints(line2)
  combined = list.push(combined, x)
end

let unique = dedup(combined)
let sorted = sort_asc(unique)

mut out_str = ""
mut first = true
for x in sorted
  if first
    out_str = "#{x}"
    first = false
  else
    out_str = "#{out_str} #{x}"
  end
end
println(out_str)
